mapper.insert: insert into product_location (product_id, shelf_code, layer_num, position_code, remark, create_time, update_time) values (#{productId}, #{shelfCode}, #{layerNum}, #{positionCode}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update product_location
shelf_code = #{shelfCode},
layer_num = #{layerNum},
position_code = #{positionCode},
remark = #{remark},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select:
select pl.id, pl.product_id, p.name as product_name, p.image as product_image, pl.shelf_code, pl.layer_num, pl.position_code, pl.remark from product_location pl left join product p on pl.product_id = p.id
and pl.shelf_code like concat('%', #{shelfCode}, '%')
order by pl.shelf_code, pl.layer_num
